template:
{{if .payment}}### ✅ Customs Payment Completed

The consignment duty payment has been successfully settled.

* **Receipt Number**: `{{.payment.receipt_number}}`
* **CusDec Number**: `{{.cusdec_number}}`
* **Amount Paid**: **LKR {{.amount_to_pay}}**{{else}}### Wait on Customs Payment

Please make the duty/consignment payment of **LKR {{.amount_to_pay}}** to the Customs Account.

* **Customs Account**: 1000-2026-9042 (Bank of Ceylon)
* **CusDec Number**: `{{.cusdec_number}}`

Once the payment is settled, Customs will notify the Single Window, and this task will automatically mark as completed. You do not need to upload any receipt.{{end}}
